name: speclet-vscode
description: Spec-driven development — use @speclet in GitHub Copilot Chat

chatParticipants.name: speclet
chatParticipants.description: Spec-driven development — generate tasks, implement phases, clarify plans, and more

commands.name: tasks
commands.description: Generate tasks for one or all phases. Optionally pass a phase: /tasks 1

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Implement a phase. Pass phase number or name: /implement 1

commands.name: clarify
commands.description: Generate clarifying questions about the plan or a specific phase: /clarify 2

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze tasks for gaps, conflicts, and risks: /analyze or /analyze 1

commands.name: constitution
commands.description: Fill in or update the project constitution
